articles.title: SEO Study: 5 Lessons From Running AI Agents Across Every Search via @sejournal, @lorenbaker
articles.summary: Last year, 2.5% of Writesonic’s leads came from AI search. As of March, 35% do. Samanyou Garg, Founder and CEO of Writesonic, showed the system behind that number in his Search Engine Journal webinar: agents surface what moved across every search platform, practitioners prioritize and act. “AI search didn’t necessarily kill SEO, but it turned it into an engineering problem,” he said.
